title: LCC02046 drawing
claim_supported: 20-lead LCC geometry; cavity and body dimensions; chamfer datum; metallization notes
limitations: Numbering still requires a physical carrier/chamfer continuity sign-off; drawing does not establish die p1-p4 orientation or continuous-250C life

title: Leadless Chip Carrier overview
claim_supported: LCC02046 is a 20-lead 0.35-in-square 0.050-in-pitch carrier; internal traces terminate at metallized castellations; direct mount or socket use is contemplated
limitations: General interface description only; no 250C-UHV socket or solder-process qualification

title: Vacuum wiring accessories catalog
claim_supported: UHV contact terminal wire-nut and solder material/temperature classes; one exact 0.094-in Au-plated BeCu crimp contact is cataloged at 250C and UHV 1e-10 Torr
limitations: Ratings differ by exact part; generic push-on limits cannot be transferred to the specific crimp contact; the 0.094-in part is far larger than an LCC castellation; catalog maximum is not a retained-force or continuous-life demonstration; 110796 solder text/headline are internally inconsistent

title: Zirconia material and machining
claim_supported: Zirconia can be green/biscuit/fired machined; about 20 percent sintering shrinkage; tight tolerances require post-fire diamond grinding
limitations: Indicative process guidance only; grade-specific drawing review and quote required

title: Green machining technical ceramics
claim_supported: Green machining is routine; firing typically 1500-1800C; precise drilling or hard grinding may need later processing
limitations: No project-specific minimum wall radius tolerance yield or cost

title: 19C-275 19-pin CF feedthrough
claim_supported: P/N 110210; 19 male/male pins; SS and glass-ceramic; UHV 1e-10 Torr; -200 to 250C; 5 A/pin at 20C; live listed price 434 USD
limitations: 250C is both the maximum operating and bake value with zero stated life margin; Ni-Fe Au-plated pins require magnetic-budget review; price/stock are time-sensitive

title: 19C-275 mechanical drawing P/N 110210
claim_supported: 2.75-in CF geometry; 4-40 mounting; 304SS; 500 VDC; 5 A at 20C; -200 to 250C; UHV 1e-10 Torr
limitations: Mated vacuum-side protrusion and supported contact/conductor geometry still require written confirmation and assembly stack-up

title: MIL-C-26482 circular feedthrough catalog
claim_supported: 19C connector envelope; PEEK vacuum cable construction; 28-AWG silver-plated copper and Kapton; assembly limited by lowest-rated part
limitations: Catalog prices may be stale; PEEK cable/connector is rated exactly 250C and has no continuous-life preload qualification

title: 19-way female vacuum connector cable P/N 110230
claim_supported: PEEK/Kapton/silver-plated copper construction; UHV 1e-10 Torr; max operating and bake 250C; 2 A; live listed price 398 USD
limitations: Exact 250C maximum gives no margin; PEEK retention/creep and cable magnetic plating must be qualified for continuous duty

title: Push-on and in-line connectors
claim_supported: Bare Au-plated BeCu push-on contacts are 200C vacuum; screw-secured in-line contacts are 400C vacuum
limitations: Not sized for LCC castellations; BeCu retained force at 250C is not established; SS screws and plating need magnetic review

title: UHV terminal blocks
claim_supported: PEEK blocks are offered to 250C and UHV 1e-10 Torr; ceramic blocks to 500C but HV 1e-8 Torr
limitations: PEEK equals operating maximum; ceramic block vacuum class may miss the project UHV target; neither proves small-signal joint stability

title: Ceramic and PEEK specialty connector overview
claim_supported: Glass-ceramic/Macor alternatives exist for environments beyond standard PEEK; in-line contacts are rated 400C and UHV
limitations: No ready-made 20-contact LCC socket and no magnetic/material declaration for a custom miniature assembly

title: 300C UHV shielded twisted pair KAP301
claim_supported: 32-AWG 7x0.08-mm silver-plated copper; Kapton; 1.5+/-0.15-mm OD; 300C; UHV typical 1e-12 mbar; 0.4 A typical at 250C; pair/screen capacitance data
limitations: Six separate shielded pairs may be too bulky for the head exit; screen alloy/underplate and continuous flex life need confirmation

title: KAP301 twisted-pair live product
claim_supported: Orderable 10-m 300C UHV cable; live listed 434 USD excluding VAT
limitations: Price and stock are time-sensitive; purchase length far exceeds prototype need

title: 300C UHV 28-AWG Kapton wire
claim_supported: 0.7-mm-OD single silver-plated-copper Kapton wire rated 300C for UHV
limitations: Untwisted singles need a defined pairing/shielding/strain-relief plan; silver/plating stack needs magnetic confirmation

title: Aluminum wedge bonds aged to 250C
claim_supported: 25-um Al wedge bonds aged at up to 250C for 6-12 months; Al to thin-film Au was reported reliable for Au thickness up to about 1 um
limitations: Coupon substrates/processes are not the actual die/LCC/UHV stack; actual pad metal thickness wire and bonding recipe require qualification

title: Thermal soaking of small aluminum wire bonds
claim_supported: 150C 72-h exposure reduced pull strength substantially for Al bonds on both thick- and thin-film Au in tested assemblies
limitations: Older materials/processes and 150C exposure are not direct project qualification; supports aged-distribution testing rather than a design limit

title: Au-Al ball-bond degradation at 175 and 250C
claim_supported: Au wire on Al pads develops intermetallic transformations cavities and failure mechanisms during thermal exposure including 250C
limitations: Opposite wire/pad direction from the proposed Al-wire-to-Au-shelf interface; relevant warning not a direct lifetime prediction

title: MIL-STD-883 active document landing
claim_supported: MIL-STD-883 is active and current revisions/changes are controlled at DLA
limitations: Project must freeze the exact revision/change in its traveler before accepting numeric criteria

title: MIL-STD-883 Part 2 Method 2011 bond pull
claim_supported: Method 2011 destructive bond-pull apparatus specimen representation and minimum-force framework
limitations: MIL minimums alone do not establish continuous-250C life; actual geometry and aged control distributions are required

title: NASA-STD-8739.4 crimp harness workmanship
claim_supported: Active workmanship standard for critical crimp cable and harness assemblies
limitations: Workmanship acceptance is not a 250C-UHV material or lifetime qualification

title: NASA-STD-8739.4A with Change 2
claim_supported: Detailed crimp harness process inspection and acceptance controls
limitations: Applicability to custom miniature vacuum joints must be tailored and documented

title: Resistance welding stranded copper wire
claim_supported: Resistance welding stranded copper to terminals is feasible with alloy/plating/geometry-specific process development
limitations: Not an off-the-shelf qualified joint; requires actual-material DOE pull resistance cross-section and thermal-vacuum aging

title: Plating effects in resistance welding
claim_supported: Gold finish type and plated-surface condition materially affect weld consistency
limitations: Qualitative process warning; no project-specific weld schedule

title: Electrical contacts for high temperature applications
claim_supported: Custom separable contacts for operation up to 250C and attachment by laser/resistance welding solder crimp or braze are commercially credible
limitations: No UHV outgassing magnetic-permeability or continuous-force qualification for a proposed contact geometry

title: Paliney 7 contact alloy
claim_supported: Age-hardenable precious-metal contact alloy with 1015C solidus and high-strength contact use
limitations: Composition magnetic permeability UHV behavior exact temper and 250C stress-relaxation acceptance need vendor declaration

title: Ney Contact Manual
claim_supported: Stress-relaxation curves at 200/250C for Paliney contact alloys and contact-design guidance
limitations: Graph values depend on alloy temper initial stress and time; actual geometry requires analysis and coupon validation

title: Victrex PEEK material properties
claim_supported: PEEK family temperature capability and grade-dependent property framework
limitations: Family-level maximum cannot qualify an unspecified grade as a structural preload element at 250C

title: Victrex PEEK product guide
claim_supported: Tg about 143C; CTE rises above Tg; listed RTI values distinguish electrical and mechanical categories
limitations: RTI is not vacuum creep or contact-preload retention; 250C exceeds listed mechanical-without-impact RTI for unfilled grades

title: Temperature effects on copper-alloy properties
claim_supported: Creep/stress relaxation are time-temperature processes; C17200 precipitation begins near 260C and long-term exposure must be considered
limitations: No exact retained-force curve for the proposed BeCu temper/stress at 250C

title: EPO-TEK 353ND technical data sheet
claim_supported: 150C/1-h recommended cure; Tg at least 90C; weight-loss tests include 250C; suggested operating temperature below 350C is intermittent; ASTM E595 pass with proper cure
limitations: Typical values are guidance not guaranteed; no continuous-250C load-bearing life in UHV and operating point is far above Tg

title: Epoxy adhesive test measurement guide
claim_supported: 353ND example NASA outgassing values TML 0.81 percent and CVCM 0.01 percent after specified cure
limitations: ASTM E595 screening is a 125C vacuum test and does not establish continuous 250C mechanical/electrical life

title: NASA outgassing database user guide
claim_supported: ASTM E595 database method exposes samples in vacuum at 125C and reports TML/CVCM/WVR; historical screening thresholds 1.0/0.10 percent
limitations: Spaceflight screening is not a UHV pressure-outgassing rate or continuous-250C qualification

title: Gold-tin solder alloy PDS
claim_supported: 80Au20Sn eutectic melts at 280C and has published mechanical properties
limitations: Only 30C liquidus margin over 250C; no joint-creep UHV or sensor-stack qualification and no load path should rely on it without test

title: Power semiconductor assembly alloy table
claim_supported: AuSn 280C; AuGe 356C; AuSi 363C eutectic joining options
limitations: Higher-temperature alloys require metallization/wetting studies and process temperatures may damage an assembled sensor/LCC

title: ADG1208 ADG1209 Rev E datasheet
claim_supported: ADG1209 uses A0/A1/EN; 2.0-V high threshold; 2-pF typical digital input capacitance at dual supply; 120-ohm typical on resistance; active product
limitations: Live board also exposes a2 for its eight-state system; netlist remains authoritative for actual fanout

title: ADG5236 Rev B datasheet
claim_supported: 3-V logic compatibility; 2.0-V high threshold; 3-pF typical digital input capacitance; recommended for new designs
limitations: Board net mapping and cable capacitance still determine total fanout and edge integrity

title: AD8429 Rev A datasheet
claim_supported: 1-nV/sqrt-Hz input noise; gain 1-10000; 1.2-MHz bandwidth at gain 100; -40 to 125C specified
limitations: Does not resolve the live board's 109x amplitude anomaly; analog electronics are ambient only

title: RP2350 datasheet
claim_supported: GPIO drive is programmable 2/4/8/12 mA; slow/fast slew control; ADC is a shared on-chip peripheral rather than three simultaneous converter cores
limitations: GPIO cable capacitance and timing must be measured in the assembled three-board harness; on-chip ADC should not be assumed simultaneous

title: Raspberry Pi Pico 2 product page
claim_supported: Pico 2 has 26 multifunction GPIO and three ADC-capable channels; production commitment through at least January 2040
limitations: Three ADC pins do not imply simultaneous sampling; product page does not specify acquisition skew

title: InfiniiVision 1000 X-Series data sheet
claim_supported: DSOX1204G family provides four analog channels up to 2 GSa/s and 2-Mpoint memory with 8-bit ADC
limitations: Actual sample-rate sharing acquisition mode channel skew anti-aliasing and data export must be configured and bench-verified

title: DSOX1204G product page
claim_supported: Four analog channels; 2 GSa/s maximum; 2 Mpoints; 70-MHz base bandwidth; 8-bit ADC
limitations: Pricing/options and exact installed bandwidth are lab-specific; scope is a validation/acquisition option not a deterministic embedded DAQ

title: RS6 series DC-DC datasheet
claim_supported: RS6-2415D provides isolated +/-15V; 1.6-kVDC one-minute isolation; 110-pF max isolation capacitance; isolation is functional
limitations: Three boards need three independent modules/returns; functional isolation is not a protective-earth safety barrier and common 24-V input can couple noise

title: CoorsTek thick-film substrate design guide
claim_supported: Representative ceramic rules favor radiused internal corners; hole/edge webs at least substrate thickness; typical laser-machined tolerances are documented for substrates
limitations: Guide is for CoorsTek substrates not the proposed 3D zirconia parts; use only as DFM direction pending zirconia-vendor review

title: Ceramic injection molding design guidance
claim_supported: Thin uniform sections and flat support surfaces improve processability; complex zirconia forms may be molded/joined
limitations: Tooling economics likely unsuitable for 1-10 prototypes; vendor RFQ decides

title: UHV accessory components
claim_supported: Ceramic UHV accessories and in-vacuum cables are available with ratings above 250C
limitations: Not a direct miniature LCC disconnect solution; part-specific materials geometry and magnetic properties must be checked

title: Combo Lids square
claim_supported: CL-30010 is a 0.300-in square combo lid; standard combo lids use Alloy 42 or Kovar, nickel/gold plating and an attached 80Au20Sn frame
limitations: Ferromagnetic alloy/nickel and a sealed/preform architecture conflict with the near-sensor magnetic and vented-UHV baseline; no project-specific field calculation

title: 19C PEEK female connector drawing and wiring caution
claim_supported: Official 19-cavity rear-view number pattern; numbers do not appear on the part; pin-1 position reverses/mirrors across a male-to-male feedthrough; Type-T2 contact options
limitations: Drawing caution text names 9C in one sentence while the sheet is the 19C connector; apply the explicitly shown 19-cavity pattern and prove all 19 paths by continuity; PEEK/contact continuous-250C life remains open

title: SN74LVC125A quad buffer Rev T
claim_supported: Active four-channel 1.65-3.6V three-state buffer; 5-pF typical input capacitance; 3.3V propagation/drive specifications; independent output enables
limitations: Ambient junction candidate only; exact package, OE power-up behavior, branch resistor, cable and fault performance require schematic and bench validation

title: Complex Shape Forming Technology F-Molding and zirconia properties
claim_supported: Representative zirconia ZO206N properties include 10.4e-6/K CTE from 40-400 C; 1100 MPa three-point flexural strength; 210 GPa modulus; near-net forming plus final grinding process sequence
limitations: Representative in-house values are explicitly not guaranteed specifications; the project part needs a drawing-specific grade process tolerance and strength basis

title: TIMETAL 75A commercially pure titanium Grade 4 datasheet
claim_supported: ASTM Grade 4 equivalent; nonmagnetic; mean CTE 9.5e-6/K from 20-300 C; typical continuous service up to 425 C; elevated-temperature strength data
limitations: Material-property basis only; it does not qualify a formed miniature flexure fastener cleaning state galling behavior or retained force in this exact 250 C UHV assembly

title: SNZT-M1.6 titanium miniature screws
claim_supported: Grade 1 Ti M1.6 screws in 3-6 mm lengths; 2.3 mm head diameter; cleanroom wash and packing; magnetic permeability 1.0001 representative; 0.07 N m listed maximum tightening torque
limitations: Geometry/commercial candidate only; not vented and no continuous-250 C UHV service qualification; baseline material remains custom CP-Ti Grade 4 or qualified equivalent and exact fastener is HOLD

title: Vented screws and vacuum screws overview
claim_supported: Vacuum fasteners use ventilation holes to discharge gas trapped beneath threads and reduce virtual-leak behavior; titanium vented families are available in larger sizes
limitations: The titanium vented catalog families found start above the modeled miniature axes; no exact M1.4/M1.6 250 C UHV part is established; use open through-holes or custom vented hardware pending qualification

title: Green Bonding alumina representative properties
claim_supported: Representative alumina material CTE 7.2e-6/K from 40-400 C
limitations: Used only for a sensitivity calculation; Spectrum must confirm the actual LCC02046 ceramic grade and its dimensional/thermal data before release

title: InfiniiVision 1000 X-Series oscilloscope data sheet
claim_supported: The DSOX1204G family has four analog-channel models and documents bandwidth sample-rate and acquisition features
limitations: The accessible data-sheet text does not establish galvanic channel isolation or a channel-to-channel aperture-skew bound; all BNC shells are treated as common grounded instrumentation until the exact unit/manual and bench test prove otherwise

title: High-precision laser processing technology
claim_supported: Laser processing supports small-lot CAD-driven production without a mold; Kyocera explicitly identifies mold-cost and lead-time reduction and lists alumina grades through 99.6 percent; representative guidance covers plates up to 1.0 mm and hole tolerance plus or minus 0.05 mm
limitations: Commercial process capability and representative material values only; no drawing-specific price UHV cleaning edge strength or continuous-life guarantee for the HSX guard

title: Polished alumina substrates
claim_supported: 99.6 percent alumina polished substrates are offered in standard 0.25 0.38 and 0.635 mm thicknesses with representative plus or minus 0.02 mm thickness tolerance below 3 inch square
limitations: Does not establish that a 10.90 mm guard with window and notch is stocked or UHV-qualified; exact lot process edge finish and price require RFQ

title: Production and processing of ceramic substrates
claim_supported: CeramTec lists stamping laser cutting dry pressing and hard machining; laser-cut alumina supports external contours through holes and CAD-driven prototypes without tooling and is described as economical at small and large volumes
limitations: Marketing/process capability is not a quote or qualification; the project must obtain drawing-specific DFM cost cleanliness chip-edge and hot-vacuum evidence

title: Miniature 3-dimensional package for MEMS sensors EP1642365B1
claim_supported: Shows orthogonal ceramic sensor mounting surfaces accepting individually packaged LCC devices and explicitly describes individual sensor rework
limitations: Architecture inspiration only; the recessed monolithic package is not evidence of low cost UHV compatibility 250 C life or the HSX envelope

title: Three-axis prismatic Hall probe for K3A
claim_supported: A commercial 9.0 x 4.5 x 4.5 mm three-axis probe uses three discrete Hall sensors in a printed alumina ceramic package and a remote cable/electronics architecture
limitations: Geometry inspiration only; cryogenic product uses a different sensor/assembly and does not establish independent LCC reuse 250 C UHV no-adhesive retention or HSX calibration
